title: Formspec Changelog Document
description: Enumerates differences between two versions of a Formspec Definition. Each change is an atomic record describing an addition, removal, modification, move, or rename of a definition element (item, bind, shape, optionSet, dataSource, screener, migration, or metadata). Impact classification (breaking/compatible/cosmetic) drives semver governance and migration generation.

x-lm.intent: Version pin for changelog document compatibility.

definitionUrl.description: Canonical URL of the Definition whose versions are compared. Must match the definition's top-level 'url' property.

x-lm.intent: Canonical identifier of the form definition whose versions are compared.

fromVersion.description: Base version (before changes). Interpreted per the definition's versionAlgorithm (default: semver).

x-lm.intent: Starting version for the changelog diff.

toVersion.description: Target version (after changes). Interpreted per the definition's versionAlgorithm (default: semver).

x-lm.intent: Destination version for the changelog diff.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this changelog was generated.

semverImpact.description: Maximum impact across all changes. Must equal the highest impact in the changes array: breaking → major, compatible → minor, cosmetic → patch.

x-lm.intent: Computed aggregate semantic-version impact for the release. Drives CI/CD gates and migration requirements.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of changes for release notes.
examples: Removes legacy budget fields; adds new personnel section.

changes.description: Ordered array of Change objects. Each entry describes one atomic modification to a definition element.

x-lm.intent: Atomic change records used for migration generation, impact analysis, and reviewer notifications.

Change.description: A single atomic modification to a definition element. The combination of type + target + path uniquely identifies what changed; impact classifies severity; before/after capture the structural diff; migrationHint suggests how to transform existing response data.

type.description: Kind of change. 'added': new element in toVersion. 'removed': element absent in toVersion. 'modified': element exists in both but properties differ. 'moved': element relocated to a different parent group (key preserved). 'renamed': item key changed (detected heuristically — unpaired remove/add with matching dataType, children, and binds).

x-lm.intent: Determines which of before/after is present and how migration tooling interprets the change.

target.description: Category of affected definition element. 'item': field, group, or display node. 'bind': reactive behavioral declaration (calculate, relevant, required, readonly, constraint). 'shape': composable validation rule. 'optionSet': named reusable option list. 'dataSource': secondary instance declaration. 'screener': routing rule. 'migration': version migration map. 'metadata': top-level properties (title, description, status, formPresentation).

x-lm.intent: Scopes the change to a definition subsystem so tooling can route to the appropriate diff handler.

path.description: Dot-path to the affected element within the definition. For items: 'items.' prefix followed by group nesting (e.g., 'items.budget.personnel'). For binds: the bind's target path (e.g., 'budget.totalCost'). For shapes: 'shapes.' + shape id. For optionSets: 'optionSets.' + set name. For metadata: the property name (e.g., 'title', 'status').

x-lm.intent: Locates the affected element for programmatic diff application and human review navigation.

key.description: The item's key property when target is 'item'. Provides the stable identifier used to match items across versions.

impact.description: Severity classification of this change. 'breaking' (→ major): existing responses may be invalid — item removed, key renamed, dataType changed, required added to existing field, repeat toggled, itemType changed, option removed from closed set. 'compatible' (→ minor): additive, no data loss — optional item added, option added, constraint relaxed, item moved, new shape/bind. 'cosmetic' (→ patch): display-only — label/hint/description/help changed, display order changed.

x-lm.intent: Drives semver bump computation, CI/CD gates, and migration requirement assessment. The document-level semverImpact must equal the maximum impact across all changes.

description.description: Human-readable description of the change for release notes and reviewer context.

before.description: Previous value or structural fragment. Present for 'modified' (changed properties only), 'removed' (full element snapshot), 'renamed' (object with old key), and 'moved' (object with old path). Omitted for 'added'.

after.description: New value or structural fragment. Present for 'added' (full element snapshot), 'modified' (changed properties only), 'renamed' (object with new key), and 'moved' (object with new path). Omitted for 'removed'.

migrationHint.description: Suggested transform for existing response data. Three forms: 'drop' (discard the value), 'preserve' (carry forward unchanged or into extension data), or a FEL expression referencing $old (e.g., '$old.cost', 'string($old.amount)'). Used to auto-generate §6.7 migration fieldMap entries.
